mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN biz_delivery_detail dd ON dd.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND dd.stock_lock_status = 1 AND dd.is_deleted = 0
f.is_deleted = 0 AND f.finish_status = 2 AND COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) > 0 AND o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (4, 5)

sql.if: AND (o.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR f.finish_roll_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR f.paper_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_uuid) AS customerCount, COUNT(*) AS totalRollCount, SUM(CASE WHEN dd.uuid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS availableRollCount, SUM(CASE WHEN dd.uuid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lockedRollCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(f.is_remain, 0) != 1 AND COALESCE(f.source_type, 1) != 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS productRollCount, SUM(CASE WHEN f.is_remain = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS remainRollCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(f.is_remain, 0) != 1 AND f.source_type = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS directRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0)), 0) AS totalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN dd.uuid IS NULL THEN COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS availableWeight, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN dd.uuid IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS lockedWeight, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN dd.uuid IS NOT NULL THEN dd.out_weight ELSE 0 END), 0) AS plannedOutWeight, SUM(CASE WHEN f.stock_in_time IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stockInTimeUnknownCount FROM biz_finish_roll f INNER JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = f.order_uuid
WHERE

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_uuid) FROM biz_finish_roll f INNER JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = f.order_uuid
WHERE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_finish_roll f INNER JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = f.order_uuid
WHERE

SELECT o.customer_uuid AS customerUuid, o.customer_name AS customerName, f.uuid AS finishUuid, f.finish_roll_no AS finishRollNo, o.uuid AS orderUuid, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_date AS orderDate, f.warehouse_uuid AS warehouseUuid, w.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, w.location AS warehouseLocation, f.paper_name AS paperName, f.gram_weight AS gramWeight, f.finish_width AS finishWidth, f.finish_diameter AS finishDiameter, f.finish_core_diameter AS finishCoreDiameter, f.actual_weight AS actualWeight, COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) AS remainingWeight, f.stock_in_time AS stockInTime, CASE WHEN f.stock_in_time IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, f.stock_in_time, NOW()) END AS stockAgeDays, f.is_remain AS isRemain, f.source_type AS sourceType, CASE WHEN dd.uuid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS stockState, dd.out_weight AS plannedOutWeight, d.uuid AS deliveryUuid, d.delivery_no AS deliveryNo FROM biz_finish_roll f INNER JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = f.order_uuid
LEFT JOIN biz_delivery_order d ON d.uuid = dd.delivery_uuid AND d.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_warehouse w ON w.uuid = f.warehouse_uuid AND w.is_deleted = 0 WHERE
ORDER BY stockState ASC,
COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) f.finish_roll_no o.order_date f.stock_in_time IS NULL, f.stock_in_time
DESC ASC, f.finish_roll_no ASC, f.uuid ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
